prompt:
Vintage botanical-style infographic for “{argument name="product" default="Artisan Brew Coffee Beans"}.” 19th-century lithograph look, aged parchment tones (brown, beige, muted green). Center: steaming coffee cup + labeled bag, elegant title “{argument name="title" default="Premium Coffee Craft"}.” Surrounding small illustrations: beans, plant, grinder, kettle, cup. Simple process grid: harvest → dry → roast → grind → brew → pour. Scenic coffee farm footer. Fine ink lines, soft watercolor, rustic, artisanal feel.
Style Keywords: Victorian ephemera, botanical illustration, aged parchment, hand-drawn ink, watercolor
Negative Prompt: modern, neon, 3D, photorealistic, clutter, watermark, low detail
translatedPrompt:
复古植物学风格信息图，主题为“{argument name="product" default="Artisan Brew Coffee Beans"}”。19 世纪石版画外观，陈旧羊皮纸色调（棕色、米色、柔和的绿色）。中心：冒热气的咖啡杯 + 带有标签的咖啡袋，优雅的标题“{argument name="title" default="Premium Coffee Craft"}”。周围环绕小型插图：咖啡豆、植物、研磨机、水壶、杯子。简单的流程网格：采摘 → 干燥 → 烘焙 → 研磨 → 冲泡 → 倾倒。底部为咖啡农场风景。精细的墨线，柔和的水彩，质朴、手工制作的质感。
风格关键词：维多利亚时代短命印刷品，植物学插画，陈旧羊皮纸，手绘墨水，水彩
负面提示词：现代，霓虹灯，3D，照片级真实感，杂乱，水印，低细节

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古植物学风格信息图：一份详细的提示词，用于创作具有 19 世纪石版画风格、带有陈旧羊皮纸质感的咖啡信息图。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, 3d, vintage, watercolor, premium, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
